posts.author: beth1021 (Elisabeth Juliano)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be very helpful if I could add a paragraph / description box in a form at any point to provide the user more information that doesn’t require a form field.

What are you trying to achieve

Example: Someone selects that they require tech support in a dropdown. Logic pops up a paragraph providing an email or phone number for the user to reach someone.

Example 2: A user selects their department and requests a new laptop through form fields. A paragraph pops up letting them know what type of laptop will be provided to them based on the department they selected and any next step instructions before they submit the form.
